title: AURCMessage
description: Frozen AURC v0.1 wire-format contract. Generated from gaiaagent.core.message.AURCMessage. Polyglot SDKs (TS/Go/Rust) and the AURC conformance suite validate messages against this artifact.

BridgeContext.description:
Protocol bridge context — tracks which protocols a message has passed through.
协议桥接上下文 — 追踪消息经过了哪些协议转换

This enables:
1. Understanding where a message originated (even across protocol boundaries)
2. Debugging multi-protocol chains
3. Applying protocol-specific security rules

origin_protocol.description: Protocol where this message originated / 消息源协议
origin_protocol.title: Origin Protocol

bridged_from.description: Previous protocol if bridged / 如果经过桥接，上一个协议
bridged_from.title: Bridged From

bridge_chain.description: Chain of bridges, e.g. ['a2a→aurc', 'aurc→mcp'] / 桥接链
bridge_chain.title: Bridge Chain

BridgeContext.title: BridgeContext

DelegationHop.description:
Single hop in a delegation chain. 委托链中的单跳

Records: who delegated to whom, with what scopes, when.
This is the key mechanism for solving MCP's Confused Deputy problem.

from_agent.description: Delegating agent's AURC ID / 委托方 AURC ID
from_agent.title: From Agent

to_agent.description: Receiving agent's AURC ID / 被委托方 AURC ID
to_agent.title: To Agent

scopes.description: Permission scopes granted in this delegation / 此次委托授予的权限范围
scopes.title: Scopes

timestamp.description: When this delegation was made / 委托时间
timestamp.title: Timestamp

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (base64); empty if unsigned / 本跳签名，未签名则空
signature.title: Signature

signing_key_id.description: Identifier of the signing key / 签名密钥标识
signing_key_id.title: Signing Key Id

DelegationHop.title: DelegationHop

ErrorInfo.description: Structured error information. 结构化错误信息

message.description: Human-readable error message / 人类可读错误消息
message.title: Message

recoverable.description: Whether the error is recoverable / 是否可恢复
recoverable.title: Recoverable

suggested_recovery.description: Suggested recovery action / 建议的恢复动作
suggested_recovery.title: Suggested Recovery

ErrorInfo.title: ErrorInfo

skill.description: Target skill ID / 目标技能 ID
skill.title: Skill

error.description: Error details if failed / 错误详情

chunk_index.description: Current chunk index / 当前块索引
chunk_index.title: Chunk Index

total_chunks.description: Total number of chunks / 总块数
total_chunks.title: Total Chunks

is_final.description: Whether this is the final chunk / 是否为最后一块
is_final.title: Is Final

capabilities_required.description: External capabilities needed / 需要的外部能力
capabilities_required.title: Capabilities Required

MessageBody.title: MessageBody

MessageDirection.description: Direction of message flow. 消息流向
MessageDirection.title: MessageDirection

MessageSecurity.description:
Security context attached to a message. 消息安全上下文

Carries authentication and authorization information needed for
protocol-level permission enforcement (solving MCP's confused deputy).

auth_token_ref.description: Reference to auth token (not the token itself) / 认证令牌引用
auth_token_ref.title: Auth Token Ref

scopes.description: Effective permission scopes for this message / 此消息的有效权限范围
scopes.title: Scopes

delegation_chain.description: Full delegation chain from original requester / 从原始请求者开始的完整委托链
delegation_chain.title: Delegation Chain

MessageSecurity.title: MessageSecurity

RoutingInfo.description: Message routing metadata. 消息路由元数据

ttl_hops.description: Maximum hops before message expires / 消息最大跳数
ttl_hops.title: Ttl Hops

timeout_ms.description: Response timeout in ms / 响应超时毫秒
timeout_ms.title: Timeout Ms

reply_to.description: Where to send the response / 响应发送目标
reply_to.title: Reply To

RoutingInfo.title: RoutingInfo

SessionInfo.description:
Session and conversation tracking. 会话追踪

Enables:
1. Multi-turn conversations between agents
2. Correlating related messages
3. Context window management

session_id.description: Unique session identifier / 会话唯一标识
session_id.title: Session Id

conversation_id.description: Conversation ID for multi-turn grouping / 多轮对话分组 ID
conversation_id.title: Conversation Id

turn.description: Turn number in conversation / 对话轮次
turn.title: Turn

parent_message_id.description: ID of the message this is responding to / 响应来源消息 ID
parent_message_id.title: Parent Message Id

SessionInfo.title: SessionInfo

aurc_version.description: AURC protocol version / AURC 协议版本
aurc_version.title: Aurc Version

message_id.description: Unique message identifier / 消息唯一标识
message_id.title: Message Id

correlation_id.description: Groups related messages across protocol boundaries / 跨协议关联相关消息
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

trace_id.description: Distributed tracing ID / 分布式追踪 ID
trace_id.title: Trace Id

timestamp.description: Message creation time (UTC) / 消息创建时间 (UTC)
timestamp.title: Timestamp

source.description: Source agent AURC ID / 源 Agent AURC ID
source.title: Source

target.description: Target agent AURC ID / 目标 Agent AURC ID
target.title: Target
